T0187.title: Three-Network Data
T0187.definition: Refers to China's three major telecom operators—China Mobile, China Telecom, and China Unicom—specifically the subscriber data tied to their phone numbers.
T0187.description: Refers to China's three major telecom operators—China Mobile, China Telecom, and China Unicom—specifically the subscriber data tied to their phone numbers.
T0187.usageExample: "Bulk queries for phone numbers registered under the three major carriers, rock-bottom prices"
